description_long: This is a stylized adult pedestrian figure with elongated, exaggerated arms that extend upward and outward in a dramatic V-shape. The person is depicted standing upright, with a casual sleeveless top and fitted pants, and their arms are disproportionately long compared to the rest of the body. The head is slightly tilted, and the facial features are simplified, giving the figure a somewhat cartoonish appearance. The shoes are simple and flat, suitable for walking. The overall build is slender, and the figure's posture is neutral, with no visible accessories or carried items. The asset's surface appears matte and smooth, with clear separation between clothing and skin areas.
description: A stylized adult pedestrian with extremely elongated, upward-stretched arms, wearing casual sleeveless attire and standing upright. The figure is slender, with simplified features and a matte finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing the face, sleeveless top, and both arms dramatically extended upward in a V-shape.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the head, torso, and the exaggerated length of the left arm.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the head, torso, and both arms extending outward from behind.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile of the head, torso, and the exaggerated length of the right arm.
attribute_clothing_type: sleeveless casual top and fitted pants
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms raised and extended outward
attribute_hairstyle: long straight hair parted to the side
